gates.label: research_x external fetch beyond approved scope
gates.reason: A fetch outside the source scope already approved for the task requires an operation-specific decision.

gates.label: Promote working note to curated source
gates.reason: Promotion changes provenance and participation authority and therefore requires explicit human acceptance.

gates.label: Promote route to project default
gates.reason: Changing the default retrieval route requires evaluation evidence and an operation-specific human decision.

gates.label: Persisted research_x schema or data migration
gates.reason: A migration of the user's persisted research_x data requires a rollback plan and post-migration verification.

gates.label: High-risk answer assertion
gates.reason: A high-risk assertion requires a restored evidence package, citations, and applicable database validation.
